description: Address 7 issues from semantic review: shell injection fix in SSH controller, device-comm HMAC auth, route dispatch for CRYPTO/HOMELAB/MIND, plaintext API secret permission check, HMAC-SHA256 test vector, autonomous learner implementation, and related fixes.
steps: Fix shell injection in ssh_controller.cpp by escaping single quotes in remote_cmd
Add HMAC-based message authentication to device_comm.cpp using the MKCryptoAuth namespace from exchange_api.cpp
Fix CRYPTO/HOMELAB/MIND route dispatch in mk_entry.cpp to call subsystem-specific logic
Add file permission check (0600) when loading API secrets in exchange_api.cpp
Add HMAC-SHA256 known-answer test (RFC 4231 vector) to test_integration.cpp
Implement actual learning logic in autonomous_learner.cpp that calls web_scraper.py via popen and passes results through knowledge validator
acceptance_criteria: SSH controller escapes single quotes in remote commands before passing to shell
Device comm validates auth_token on inbound requests using HMAC verification
CRYPTO route shows market data/signals, HOMELAB route shows device info, MIND route shows goals/mastery
Exchange API warns if config file permissions are too open (not 0600)
HMAC-SHA256 test against RFC 4231 test vector passes
Autonomous learner calls popen(web_scraper.py) and validates results through knowledge_validator
make clean && make compiles with zero errors
make test passes all tests including new HMAC test
